semantic.role: Test suite for the repair-policy module.
responsibilities: Validates targeted repair decision for small file-level violations with an existing baseline.
Validates forced full repair decision when the baseline is missing.
Validates forced full repair decision on branch-level changes.
outOfScope: Does not define any production logic or public API.
Does not test integration with other modules beyond the repair-policy interface.
invariants: File must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule test-file-suffix).
Tests must import `evaluateRepairPolicy` from the correct source path.
Test cases must cover targeted-repair, missing-baseline, and branch-change scenarios.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Maintain comprehensive test coverage for the repair policy engine to ensure correct decision-making under different conditions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Updated test cases to align with modifications in the repair policy logic (e.g., new aggregated path handling).
